_comment: Windows memory-forensics golden for MemLabs Lab 2 - A New World.
CTF-style expected claims derived from the public challenge prompt and hashes; actual flags are intentionally not included.

findings.description: Memory image contains browser activity from the user's go-to applications
findings.artifact_hint: Process list, command line, filescan, or dumped browser artifacts

findings.description: Memory image contains password-manager or credential-store artifacts relevant to recovering important data
findings.artifact_hint: Volatility filescan/dumpfiles/strings against browser and password manager processes

findings.description: Three ordered CTF flags or important recovered values can be extracted from memory
findings.artifact_hint: Recovered memory artifacts; flag values intentionally omitted from the golden
